prompt: A photorealistic automotive shot of a sleek, glossy black Bugatti Chiron parked on a cobblestone plaza. The hypercar features its signature horseshoe grille with a red emblem, illuminated quad rectangular LED headlights, black alloy wheels, and striking blue brake calipers. Its highly reflective surface mirrors the surroundings. In the background stands the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral in Paris, showcasing its intricate Gothic architecture, twin towers, central rose window, and arched entryways. Classic Parisian apartment buildings are visible to the left, and ornate vintage street lamps line the right side. A few pedestrians stroll in the distance under an overcast sky. The image is captured from a slightly low angle to emphasize the car's aggressive, aerodynamic stance.
